title: 1.8.9 Sword Blocking
description: Brings back the 1.8.9 sword blocking animation.
body:
It's completely visual - no game modifications, just the classic 1.8 blocking animations :)

Works with 1.21.5 or above.

(Looks best with Model Gap Fix mod - https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix)


- Animations break if main hand is set to left
- Incompatible with certain mod-dependant texture packs. (Furfsky Reborn, Hypixel+, etc.)
